tasks.subject: Task 1: Add cgroupMemory module (parseMemoryStat + readUsableMemory) + 4 parser fixture tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Introduce side-effect-free cgroupMemory.ts module + pure parser tests. Additive only.

**Files:**
- Create: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/cgroupMemory.ts`
- Create: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/cgroupMemory.test.ts`

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/cgroupMemory.ts", "apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/tests/cgroupMemory.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && npm test && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parseMemoryStat handles v2 file + v1 cache + missing key + malformed lines", "readUsableMemory exported with UsableMemory interface", "lookup order v2 -> v1 -> host fallback -> null", "4 unit tests pass", "npm test green (58)", "npm run build green", "main.ts callsites unchanged"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Refactor main.ts pre-flight + readContainerMemory to use readUsableMemory; dual log format
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace inline cgroup-reading with readUsableMemory() calls. Dual log format. Watchdog adapter preserves shape.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts`

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && grep -nE '/sys/fs/cgroup' src/main.ts ; npm test && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && grep -nE '/sys/fs/cgroup' src/main.ts ; npm test && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["readUsableMemory import added", "pre-flight uses helper + dual log + usablePercent>80 threshold", "readContainerMemory adapter shape unchanged", "containerMemoryMb preserved", "Tier 1/2 handler log strings unchanged in T2", "no /sys/fs/cgroup paths in main.ts", "npm test green", "npm run build green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Update Tier 1 + Tier 2 handler log strings to "% usable" suffix
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append `% usable` suffix to 3 log strings in Tier 1 + Tier 2 entry + Phase B retry. After T2 the memPercent reflects usable%.

**Files:**
- Modify: `apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts`

**Verify:** `cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && grep -nE '% usable\\)' src/main.ts ; npm test && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler/src/main.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd apps-microservices/crawler-service/crawler && grep -nE '% usable\\)' src/main.ts ; npm test && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Tier 1 entry says % usable", "Tier 2 entry says % usable", "Phase B retry says % usable", "grep returns 3 matches", "Phase A recovery flow unchanged", "npm test green", "npm run build green", "operator smoke documented"]}
```
